name: Medallia, Inc.
description: Medallia, Inc. is a leading technology company specializing in customer and employee experience management. Founded in 2001 and headquartered in the United States, the company provides a comprehensive software platform that captures feedback across various channels, including digital, social, and contact center interactions. By leveraging advanced data analytics and artificial intelligence, Medallia helps organizations gain actionable insights to improve customer satisfaction, enhance employee engagement, and drive operational efficiency. Its solutions are widely utilized by global enterprises to understand and act on the experiences of their customers and employees in real-time.
